name: Felix Group Holdings Ltd
summary: Felix Group Holdings Ltd develops and operates cloud-based enterprise SaaS and marketplace platform for the commercial construction and related industries in Australia and internationally. The company offers Felix Vendor Marketplace, an online construction marketplace for contractors and vendors to list, find, and hire equipment and subcontractors. It serves construction, mining, government, utility, and public infrastructure companies. The company was founded in 2012 and is based in Hendra, Australia.
